commands.name: alias
commands.description: Assigns longer commands to custom shortcut phrases.

commands.name: autobuy
commands.description: Purchases items configured via cl_autobuy command.

commands.name: bind
commands.description: Assigns command(s) to keyboard/mouse button.

commands.name: binddefaults
commands.description: Resets all key bindings to defaults.

commands.name: bindss
commands.description: Binds key for specific splitscreen player.

commands.name: bot_add
commands.description: Adds a bot to your current game. If you specify a team (T or CT), the bot will be added to that team.

commands.name: bot_add_ct
commands.description: Adds a bot to the CT side. If the bot spawns dead, it will respawn next round.

commands.name: bot_add_t
commands.description: Adds a bot to the T side. If the bot spawns dead, it will respawn next round.

commands.name: bot_all_weapons
commands.description: Allows bots on a private server to use all weapons.

commands.name: bot_allow_grenades
commands.description: Allows bots to use grenades when set to 1.

commands.name: bot_allow_machine_guns
commands.description: Allows bots to use machine guns when set to 1.

commands.name: bot_allow_pistols
commands.description: Allows bots to use pistols when set to 1.

commands.name: bot_allow_rifles
commands.description: Allows bots to use rifles when set to 1.

commands.name: bot_allow_rogues
commands.description: Allows bots to go rogue and ignore radio commands.

commands.name: bot_allow_shotguns
commands.description: Allows bots to use shotguns when set to 1.

commands.name: bot_allow_snipers
commands.description: Allows bots to use sniper rifles when set to 1.

commands.name: bot_allow_sub_machine_guns
commands.description: Allows bots to use SMGs when set to 1.

commands.name: bot_autodifficulty_threshold_high
commands.description: Sets bot difficulty rating to high.

commands.name: bot_autodifficulty_threshold_low
commands.description: Sets bot difficulty rating to low.

commands.name: bot_chatter
commands.description: Sets rules for bot speech (off, radio, minimal, or normal).

commands.name: bot_controllable
commands.description: Determine if players can control bots.

commands.name: bot_coop_force_throw_grenade_chance
commands.description: Sets chance bot throws grenade in coop missions.

commands.name: bot_coop_idle_max_vision_distance
commands.description: Sets max distance bots see enemies when idle in coop.

commands.name: bot_crouch
commands.description: Set to 1 will make all bots crouch, 0 to disable.

commands.name: bot_debug
commands.description: Toggles bot debug features on or off.

commands.name: bot_debug_target
commands.description: Debugs bot issues; primarily for testing purposes.

commands.name: bot_defer_to_human_goals
commands.description: Prevents bots from doing scenario tasks when enabled.

commands.name: bot_defer_to_human_items
commands.description: Prevents bots from taking scenario items when enabled.

commands.name: bot_difficulty
commands.description: Sets bot difficulty (0=easy, 1=normal, 2=hard, 3=expert).

commands.name: bot_dont_shoot
commands.description: Prevent bots from firing guns.

commands.name: bot_freeze
commands.description: Prevents bots from being able to move when set to 1.

commands.name: bot_goto_mark
commands.description: Make a bot walk to the marked navigation area.

commands.name: bot_goto_selected
commands.description: Make a bot go to the navigation area currently selected.

commands.name: bot_ignore_enemies
commands.description: Makes bots ignore enemies for debugging.

commands.name: bot_ignore_players
commands.description: Make bots unable to see or react to players.

commands.name: bot_join_after_player
commands.description: Only have bots join after another live player joins.

commands.name: bot_join_team
commands.description: Sets default team for bots added with bot_add.

commands.name: bot_kick
commands.description: Kick bots from the server by team, difficulty, or name.

commands.name: bot_kill
commands.description: Kills bots (they respawn next round, unlike bot_kick).

commands.name: bot_knives_only
commands.description: Forces all bots on the server to use knives.

commands.name: bot_loadout
commands.description: Sets what bots spawn with (weapons and grenades).

commands.name: bot_max_visible_smoke_length
commands.description: Defines max distance bots recognize players through smoke.

commands.name: bot_max_vision_distance_override
commands.description: Overrides max distance bots can see players.

commands.name: bot_mimic
commands.description: Make all bots relay your actions when enabled.

commands.name: bot_mimic_spec_buttons
commands.description: Allows spectator control inputs separate from bots.

commands.name: bot_mimic_yaw_offset
commands.description: Set the yaw offset that bots will mimic you on.

commands.name: bot_pistols_only
commands.description: Restricts bots to only use pistols.

commands.name: bot_place
commands.description: Spawn a bot where player model is standing.

commands.name: bot_quota
commands.description: Adjusts the maximum number of bots (default 10).

commands.name: bot_quota_mode
commands.description: Sets quota mode (normal, fill, match).

commands.name: bot_randombuy
commands.description: Make bots buy items randomly with their money.

commands.name: bot_show_battlefront
commands.description: Highlights map areas where rushing teams encounter first.

commands.name: bot_show_nav
commands.description: Show each bots navigation mesh when enabled.

commands.name: bot_show_occupy_time
commands.description: Shows areas reachable by each team first.

commands.name: bot_snipers_only
commands.description: Restricts bots to only use sniper rifles.

commands.name: bot_stop
commands.description: Stop all bots from doing what they are doing.

commands.name: bot_traceview
commands.description: Enables bot tracers (sight lines) drawn on screen.

commands.name: bot_zombie
commands.description: Puts bots into zombie mode (idle, non-attacking).

commands.name: buddha_ignore_bots
commands.description: Dictates whether bots ignore Buddha mode.

commands.name: button_info
commands.description: Displays technical information about a specific key or button.

commands.name: c_maxdistance
commands.description: Controls max camera distance from character in third person.

commands.name: c_maxpitch
commands.description: Sets camera maximum pitch.

commands.name: c_maxyaw
commands.description: Sets camera maximum yaw.

commands.name: c_mindistance
commands.description: Controls minimum camera distance in third person.

commands.name: c_minpitch
commands.description: Sets camera minimum pitch.

commands.name: c_minyaw
commands.description: Sets camera minimum yaw.

commands.name: callvote
commands.description: Initiates player kick or map change vote.

commands.name: cam_collision
commands.description: Prevent camera from colliding with walls in third person.

commands.name: cam_command
commands.description: Adjusts camera between first person (default) and third person.

commands.name: cam_idealdelta
commands.description: Adjusts camera angle correction speed in third person.

commands.name: cam_ideallag
commands.description: Controls how fast you can move your camera in third person.

commands.name: cam_showangles
commands.description: Enable menu showing camera angle statistics in third person.

commands.name: cam_snapto
commands.description: Snap camera to default position in third person.

commands.name: camortho
commands.description: Switches to orthographic camera view (2D-like).

commands.name: cash_player_bomb_defused
commands.description: Alters earnings for defusing the bomb.

commands.name: cash_player_bomb_planted
commands.description: Modifies earnings for planting the bomb.

commands.name: cash_player_damage_hostage
commands.description: Sets money gained/lost when damaging a hostage.

commands.name: cash_player_get_killed
commands.description: Determines earnings or losses from being killed.

commands.name: cash_player_interact_with_hostage
commands.description: Sets earnings for hostage interaction.

commands.name: cash_player_killed_enemy_default
commands.description: Controls earnings for killing with default weapons.

commands.name: cash_player_killed_enemy_factor
commands.description: Adjusts earnings for main weapon kills.

commands.name: cash_player_killed_hostage
commands.description: Sets money earned/lost when killing hostages.

commands.name: cash_player_killed_teammate
commands.description: Manages earnings for teamkills.

commands.name: cash_player_rescued_hostage
commands.description: Determines earnings for hostage rescue.

commands.name: cash_player_respawn_amount
commands.description: Sets starting funds upon respawning.

commands.name: cash_team_bonus_shorthanded
commands.description: Bonus for playing with fewer players.

commands.name: cash_team_elimination_bomb_map
commands.description: Earnings when eliminating all enemies on bomb maps.

commands.name: cash_team_elimination_hostage_map_ct
commands.description: CT earnings for hostage map elimination wins.

commands.name: cash_team_elimination_hostage_map_t
commands.description: Terrorist earnings for hostage map elimination wins.

commands.name: cash_team_hostage_alive
commands.description: Earnings when hostages survive a round.

commands.name: cash_team_hostage_interaction
commands.description: Team earnings for hostage interaction.

commands.name: cash_team_loser_bonus
commands.description: Base earnings for losing a round.

commands.name: cash_team_loser_bonus_consecutive_rounds
commands.description: Bonus increase per consecutive loss.

commands.name: cash_team_planted_bomb_but_defused
commands.description: Terrorist earnings when bomb is planted but defused.

commands.name: cash_team_rescued_hostage
commands.description: Team earnings when hostage is rescued.

commands.name: cash_team_terrorist_win_bomb
commands.description: Earnings when Terrorists win via bomb explosion.

commands.name: cash_team_win_by_defusing_bomb
commands.description: CT earnings for defuse-based round wins.

commands.name: cash_team_win_by_hostage_rescue
commands.description: Earnings for hostage rescue round wins.

commands.name: cash_team_win_by_time_running_out_bomb
commands.description: CT earnings when time expires on bomb maps.

commands.name: cash_team_win_by_time_running_out_hostage
commands.description: Earnings for protecting hostages until time expires.

commands.name: changelevel
commands.description: Transitions to a different map.

commands.name: cl_allow_animated_avatars
commands.description: Permits animated player avatars.

commands.name: cl_autobuy
commands.description: Enables automatic purchasing of essential gear each round.

commands.name: cl_borrow_music_from_player_slot
commands.description: Allows borrowing music kits from other players.

commands.name: cl_buywheel_donate_key
commands.description: Sets key for donations in buy menu.

commands.name: cl_buywheel_nonumberpurchasing
commands.description: Prevents number key purchasing via buy wheel.

commands.name: cl_cl_radialmenu_deadzone_size
commands.description: Adjusts radial menu mouse/stick response threshold.

commands.name: cl_clock_recvmargin_enable
commands.description: Activates client-side clock synchronization strategy.

commands.name: cl_clockdrift_max_ticks
commands.description: Sets maximum client clock drift before correction.

commands.name: cl_clutch_mode
commands.description: Silences distracting sounds during clutch situations.

commands.name: cl_color
commands.description: Sets player color preference in matchmaking.

commands.name: cl_connectionretrytime_p2p
commands.description: Determines P2P connection retry attempt duration.

commands.name: cl_cq_min_queue
commands.description: Controls command queue size handling.

commands.name: cl_crosshair_drawoutline
commands.description: Enable and disable the small black outline around your crosshair.

commands.name: cl_crosshair_dynamic_maxdist_splitratio
commands.description: Determines inner/outer line ratio for dynamic crosshair style 2.

commands.name: cl_crosshair_dynamic_splitalpha_innermod
commands.description: Adjusts the transparency of the inner crosshair.

commands.name: cl_crosshair_dynamic_splitalpha_outermod
commands.description: Adjusts the transparency of the outer crosshair.

commands.name: cl_crosshair_dynamic_splitdist
commands.description: Sets separation distance for crosshair movement in style 2.

commands.name: cl_crosshair_friendly_warning
commands.description: Configures whether a visual indication is shown on the crosshair when aimed at friendly players.

commands.name: cl_crosshair_outlinethickness
commands.description: Adjusts how thick the outline of your crosshair is.

commands.name: cl_crosshair_sniper_width
commands.description: Sets scoped sniper rifle crosshair width in pixels.

commands.name: cl_crosshair_t
commands.description: Makes crosshair T-style by omitting top line.

commands.name: cl_crosshairalpha
commands.description: Sets how transparent your crosshair is on your screen.

commands.name: cl_crosshaircolor
commands.description: Sets the color that your crosshair shows up as (0-4).

commands.name: cl_crosshaircolor_b
commands.description: Adjusts blue RGB value for crosshair color customization.

commands.name: cl_crosshaircolor_g
commands.description: Adjusts green RGB value for crosshair color customization.

commands.name: cl_crosshaircolor_r
commands.description: Adjusts red RGB value for crosshair color customization.

commands.name: cl_crosshairdot
commands.description: Adds a dot in the center of your crosshair.

commands.name: cl_crosshairgap
commands.description: Adjusts the size of the gap in the middle of your crosshair.

commands.name: cl_crosshairgap_useweaponvalue
commands.description: Dynamically adjusts gap size based on equipped weapon.

commands.name: cl_crosshairsize
commands.description: Controls the length and size of the 4 lines in standard crosshair.

commands.name: cl_crosshairstyle
commands.description: Sets the style of your crosshair such as its general shape.

commands.name: cl_crosshairthickness
commands.description: Customizes the thickness of your in game crosshair.

commands.name: cl_crosshairusealpha
commands.description: Adjusts overall crosshair transparency settings.

commands.name: cl_dangerzone_approaching_sound_radius
commands.description: Sets the radius for approaching sound in Danger Zone.

commands.name: cl_dangerzone_moving_sound_volume
commands.description: Sets the volume of moving sound in Danger Zone.

commands.name: cl_dangerzone_sound_volume
commands.description: Sets the volume of sound effects in Danger Zone.

commands.name: cl_deathnotices_show_numbers
commands.description: Displays numbers in kill feed.

commands.name: cl_debounce_zoom
commands.description: Determines if players can hold secondary fire to cycle zoom.

commands.name: cl_dm_buyrandomweapons
commands.description: Spawns players with random weapons in deathmatch.

commands.name: cl_draw_only_deathnotices
commands.description: Strips down the UI to only include the crosshair and the kill feed.

commands.name: cl_drawhud
commands.description: Toggles visibility of all HUD elements.

commands.name: cl_drawhud_force_deathnotices
commands.description: Controls kill feed display conditions.

commands.name: cl_drawhud_force_radar
commands.description: Controls radar display conditions.

commands.name: cl_drawhud_force_teamid_overhead
commands.description: Controls teammate ID display conditions.

commands.name: cl_error_report_time
commands.description: Sets minimum time before printing prediction error summaries.

commands.name: cl_fixedcrosshairgap
commands.description: Alters the gap inbetween the pips for fixed crosshair.

commands.name: cl_hud_color
commands.description: Changes HUD color from 11 preset options (0-10).

commands.name: cl_hud_radar_scale
commands.description: Controls how much room in your HUD your radar takes up.

commands.name: cl_invites_only_friends
commands.description: Ignores invites from non-friends.

commands.name: cl_invites_only_mainmenu
commands.description: Restricts game invites to main menu only.

commands.name: cl_mouselook
commands.description: Controls whether you look around using your mouse or keyboard.

commands.name: cl_mute_all_but_friends_and_party
commands.description: Mute all except Steam friends and party members.

commands.name: cl_mute_enemy_team
commands.description: Mute communication from all enemy players.

commands.name: cl_net_buffer_ticks
commands.description: Controls snapshot and command delay buffer ticks.

commands.name: cl_observed_bot_crosshair
commands.description: Controls crosshair display when observing a bot.

commands.name: cl_pitchdown
commands.description: Controls how many degrees down from eye level you can look.

commands.name: cl_pitchup
commands.description: Controls how many degrees from eye level you can look up.

commands.name: cl_playerspray_auto_apply
commands.description: Sets whether graffiti is auto-applied when closing menu.

commands.name: cl_playerspraydisable
commands.description: Disables the ability for players to use their sprays.

commands.name: cl_radar_always_centered
commands.description: Determines if radar stays centered on player location.

commands.name: cl_radar_icon_scale_min
commands.description: Changes how large your character dot appears on the radar.

commands.name: cl_radar_rotate
commands.description: Toggles whether radar rotates with player camera movement.

commands.name: cl_radar_scale
commands.description: Adjusts the scale of your radar (zoom level).

commands.name: cl_radar_square_with_scoreboard
commands.description: Changes radar shape when scoreboard opens.

commands.name: cl_radial_radio_tab
commands.description: Sets the default tab displayed when opening radial radio.

commands.name: cl_radial_radio_tap_to_ping
commands.description: Enables pinging by tapping radial radio without selection.

commands.name: cl_radial_radio_version_reset
commands.description: Resets radial radio version to default value.

commands.name: cl_radialmenu_deadzone_size_joystick
commands.description: Adjusts radial menu deadzone for joystick precision.

commands.name: cl_ragdoll_limit
commands.description: Sets maximum visible ragdoll corpses (-1 removes limit).

commands.name: cl_rebuy
commands.description: Sets the order in which the game client rebuys your gear.

commands.name: cl_resend
commands.description: Sets client reconnection wait time after failed attempts.

commands.name: cl_sanitize_muted_players
commands.description: Hide the names and avatars of muted players.

commands.name: cl_sanitize_player_names
commands.description: Replaces player names with placeholders.

commands.name: cl_show_observer_crosshair
commands.description: Displays observed player's crosshair.

commands.name: cl_showfps
commands.description: Displays frames-per-second counter in top left corner.

commands.name: cl_showmem
commands.description: Shows approximate memory usage.

commands.name: cl_showpos
commands.description: Displays player position coordinates and velocity.

commands.name: cl_silencer_mode
commands.description: Enables or disables silencers on compatible weapons.

commands.name: cl_sim_grenade_trajectory
commands.description: Visualize the trajectory path a grenade will follow.

commands.name: cl_sniper_delay_unscope
commands.description: Controls delay for sniper rifle unscoping after firing.

commands.name: cl_spec_stats
commands.description: Shows or hides statistics while observing matches.

commands.name: cl_spec_swapplayersides
commands.description: Swaps spectator player name positions.

commands.name: cl_teamid_overhead_colors_show
commands.description: Shows teammate IDs in team colors.

commands.name: cl_teamid_overhead_maxdist
commands.description: Sets max range for teammate icons.

commands.name: cl_teamid_overhead_maxdist_spec
commands.description: Sets spectator icon visibility range.

commands.name: cl_teamid_overhead_mode
commands.description: Controls teammate identifier display options.

commands.name: cl_teammate_colors_show
commands.description: Enables different teammate colors.

commands.name: cl_timeout
commands.description: Set client disconnect timeout duration.

commands.name: cl_usenewbob
commands.description: Enables new weapon bobbing effect.

commands.name: cl_wallbang_heavy_threshold
commands.description: Sets threshold for wallbang tracer display.

commands.name: clear
commands.description: Clears all previous entries from the developer console.

commands.name: clearall
commands.description: Clear console output across all views.

commands.name: closecaption
commands.description: Alters whether closed captions are available in game.

commands.name: clutch_mode_toggle
commands.description: Toggles clutch mode configuration.

commands.name: connect
commands.description: Join a server by IP address.

commands.name: connect_hltv
commands.description: Connects to HLTV server for spectating broadcasts.

commands.name: crosshair
commands.description: Toggle whether or not your crosshair is visible in game.

commands.name: csgo_download_match
commands.description: Retrieves a match replay using its unique serial code.

commands.name: custom_bot_difficulty
commands.description: Determines difficulty of custom bots (0-4).

commands.name: cv_bot_ai_bt_hiding_spot_show
commands.description: Visualize the hiding spots for bots on map.

commands.name: cv_bot_ai_bt_moveto_show_next_hiding_spot
commands.description: Visualizes next hiding spot bots will check.

commands.name: cvarlist
commands.description: Display console variables matching criteria.

commands.name: default_fov
commands.description: Sets field of view to any value; requires sv_cheats.

commands.name: demo_flush
commands.description: Forces immediate demo file writes.

commands.name: demo_goto
commands.description: Navigates to tick with relative/pause options.

commands.name: demo_gotomark
commands.description: Jumps to previously marked demo tick.

commands.name: demo_gototick
commands.description: Advances demo playback to a specific tick number.

commands.name: demo_info
commands.description: Outputs current demo information.

commands.name: demo_marktick
commands.description: Marks current playback position.

commands.name: demo_pause
commands.description: Pauses current demo playback.

commands.name: demo_quitafterplayback
commands.description: Auto-closes game after demo ends.

commands.name: demo_recordcommands
commands.description: Records console commands into demo files.

commands.name: demo_resume
commands.description: Resumes paused demo playback.

commands.name: demo_timescale
commands.description: Adjusts demo playback speed multiplier.

commands.name: demo_togglepause
commands.description: Toggles between pause and play states.

commands.name: demolist
commands.description: Lists demo sequences in console.

commands.name: demoui
commands.description: Shows/hides the demo player interface.

commands.name: differences
commands.description: Print a list of all convars not set to default value.

commands.name: disconnect
commands.description: Leave current game session.

commands.name: dm_togglerandomweapons
commands.description: Toggle random weapon spawns in deathmatch mode.

commands.name: echo
commands.description: Print a specified message to the console.

commands.name: endround
commands.description: Terminates the current round immediately.

commands.name: ent_kill
commands.description: Instantly kill specific entities (players, bots, etc.).

commands.name: exec_async
commands.description: Execute config file.

commands.name: fadein
commands.description: Fades screen in with optional color.

commands.name: fadeout
commands.description: Fades screen out with optional color.

commands.name: ff_damage_bullet_penetration
commands.description: Sets multiplier for friendly fire bullet penetration.

commands.name: ff_damage_reduction_bullets
commands.description: Adjusts teammate bullet damage multiplier.

commands.name: ff_damage_reduction_grenade
commands.description: Controls teammate grenade damage multiplier.

commands.name: ff_damage_reduction_grenade_self
commands.description: Self-inflicted grenade damage multiplier.

commands.name: ff_damage_reduction_other
commands.description: Non-bullet/grenade friendly damage multiplier.

commands.name: firstperson
commands.description: Enables first person mode.

commands.name: fog_color
commands.description: Sets fog coloring via RGB values.

commands.name: fog_colorskybox
commands.description: Configures skybox fog coloration using RGB.

commands.name: fog_enable
commands.description: Toggles fog rendering on or off.

commands.name: fog_enableskybox
commands.description: Controls whether fog affects the skybox.

commands.name: fog_end
commands.description: Sets maximum fog rendering distance.

commands.name: fog_endskybox
commands.description: Determines skybox fog visibility range.

commands.name: fog_hdrcolorscale
commands.description: Adjusts fog HDR color intensity (0-1).

commands.name: fog_hdrcolorscaleskybox
commands.description: Modifies skybox fog HDR scaling.

commands.name: fog_maxdensity
commands.description: Controls fog opacity (0-1 range).

commands.name: fog_maxdensityskybox
commands.description: Sets skybox fog maximum opacity.

commands.name: fog_override
commands.description: Toggles map fog setting override.

commands.name: fog_override_color
commands.description: Applies custom fog color override.

commands.name: fog_override_enable
commands.description: Activates fog override feature.

commands.name: fog_override_end
commands.description: Sets fog override opacity distance.

commands.name: fog_override_exponent
commands.description: Adjusts fog intensity and brightness.

commands.name: fog_override_max_density
commands.description: Controls override fog opacity level.

commands.name: fog_override_start
commands.description: Sets fog override visibility start point.

commands.name: fog_start
commands.description: Sets fog rendering start distance.

commands.name: fog_startskybox
commands.description: Defines skybox fog start point.

commands.name: fov_cs_debug
commands.description: Adjusts camera field of view with sv_cheats, allowing unlimited FOV values.

commands.name: fov_desired
commands.description: Sets the base field-of-view value.

commands.name: fps_max
commands.description: Limits frames-per-second rendering.

commands.name: game_mode
commands.description: Specifies game mode when used with game_type.

commands.name: game_type
commands.description: Sets game type for server gameplay.

commands.name: gameinstructor_enable
commands.description: Toggles in-game instructor feature.

commands.name: gameui_hide
commands.description: Closes pause menu.

commands.name: give
commands.description: Spawns specified weapon or item.

commands.name: givecurrentammo
commands.description: Restocks ammunition to maximum.

commands.name: hideconsole
commands.description: Hides developer console.

commands.name: hidehud
commands.description: Shows or hides HUD elements.

commands.name: host_framerate
commands.description: Adjust server frame rate speed.

commands.name: host_timescale
commands.description: Speed up or slow down server time.

commands.name: host_writeconfig
commands.description: Save server settings to config file.

commands.name: hostname
commands.description: Set server display name.

commands.name: hostport
commands.description: Configure server port number.

commands.name: hud_fastswitch
commands.description: Enables fast weapon switching.

commands.name: hud_scaling
commands.description: Scales overall HUD size.

commands.name: hud_showtargetid
commands.description: Shows or hides enemy name text overlay.

commands.name: hurtme
commands.description: Hurts your character with specified damage amount.

commands.name: inferno_damage
commands.description: Modifies molotov/incendiary damage per second.

commands.name: inferno_flame_lifetime
commands.description: Adjusts fire grenade burn duration.

commands.name: inferno_max_range
commands.description: Maximum spread distance for fire grenades.

commands.name: input_filter_relative_analog_inputs
commands.description: Filters analog inputs for enhanced precision.

commands.name: input_forceuser
commands.description: Forces user input to a specified split screen player.

commands.name: invnext
commands.description: Cycles to next inventory item.

commands.name: invnextselect
commands.description: Cycles to next inventory item and selects it.

commands.name: invprev
commands.description: Cycles to previous inventory item.

commands.name: invprevselect
commands.description: Selects previously highlighted inventory item.

commands.name: ip
commands.description: Override multi-host IP settings.

commands.name: joy_advanced
commands.description: Advanced joystick configuration.

commands.name: joy_advaxisr
commands.description: Advanced right axis settings.

commands.name: joy_advaxisu
commands.description: Advanced U-axis settings.

commands.name: joy_advaxisv
commands.description: Advanced V-axis settings.

commands.name: joy_advaxisx
commands.description: Advanced X-axis settings.

commands.name: joy_advaxisy
commands.description: Advanced Y-axis settings.

commands.name: joy_advaxisz
commands.description: Advanced Z-axis settings.

commands.name: joy_axisbutton_threshold
commands.description: Controls analog stick range for button registration.
